name: Nicodemus
oracleText:
Flash
Whenever Nicodemus enters the battlefield or attacks, scry 2.
Whenever you cast a spell during an opponent's turn, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.
flavorText: "Rabbi, we know that thou art a teacher come from God." — John 3:2
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Interview between Jesus and Nicodemus" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Teacher by Night

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, Interview between Jesus and Nicodemus
classics.sourceNotes: A direct Nicodemus-by-night scene makes this the strongest fit for the card.
